languages.text: Вы нанесли оскорбление меровцам, отказавшись от их помощи в бою с Погонщицей.
You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.
languages.original_text: Вы нанесли оскорбление меровцам, отказавшись от их помощи в бою с Погонщицей.

traits.locale_text: You caused offense to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.
You caused offense to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

languages.text: Ofendiste a los merovianos al rechazar su ayuda contra el Pastor.
languages.original_text: You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

traits.locale_text: Ofendiste a los merovianos al rechazar su ayuda contra el Pastor.

languages.text: 你拒绝了梅罗夫人帮忙对付拒生花的提议，因此得罪了他们。
languages.original_text: You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

traits.locale_text: 你拒绝了梅罗夫人帮忙对付拒生花的提议，因此得罪了他们。

languages.text: Vous avez froissé les Méroviens en refusant leur aide pour combattre le Chasseur.
languages.original_text: You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez froissé les Méroviens en refusant leur aide pour combattre le Chasseur.

languages.text: Çoban'a karşı savaşta yardımlarını reddederek Merovluları gücendirdin.
languages.original_text: You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

traits.locale_text: Çoban'a karşı savaşta yardımlarını reddederek Merovluları gücendirdin.

languages.text: ドロバーとの戦いで彼らの助けを断ったことで、メロヴィング朝に不快感を与えた。
languages.original_text: You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

traits.locale_text: ドロバーとの戦いで彼らの助けを断ったことで、メロヴィング朝に不快感を与えた。

languages.text: Du hast die Merovianer verärgert, indem du ihre Hilfe im Kampf gegen den Treiber abgelehnt hast.
languages.original_text: You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.

traits.locale_text: Du hast die Merovianer verärgert, indem du ihre Hilfe im Kampf gegen den Treiber abgelehnt hast.
